title: Rich Mediterranean Mozzarella Pasta
description: A garlicky, cheese-pull pasta infused with fresh mint, basil, and bright tomato, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil, then cook spaghetti until al dente, about 8-10 minutes, draining and reserving 1 cup of pasta water.
While the pasta cooks, heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds, being careful not to burn.
Toss in halved cherry tomatoes and cook until just softened, about 2 minutes.
Remove the skillet from heat and stir in diced mozzarella, chopped mint, chopped basil, lemon zest, and red pepper flakes until the cheese begins to melt.
Add the cooked spaghetti to the skillet, tossing to coat it with the tomato-cheese mixture.
If the pasta seems dry, slowly add reserved pasta water a tablespoon at a time until silky.
Season with salt and pepper, serve immediately, optionally garnishing with extra mint or basil.
